title: PPIP - Dialog after Onboarding - Tap on Don't Share
scenario: PPIP "Don't Share" selection correctly sets Share Data toggle to OFF in App Settings > General > Account after onboarding
steps: 1. Complete the onboarding flow in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. When the PPIP (Product Privacy & Improvement Program) dialog appears, tap "Don't Share".
3. Observe that the dialog closes and the Home screen is displayed.
4. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
expected: The "Share data" toggle is shown as OFF with a description about sharing basic device and app information (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) for product improvement, with no personal data shared with third parties.
